elements.name: timeout_html
elements.html:
⛔
TIME EXPIREDYour time is up. The operation is over.

Please answer the following questions based on what you attempted.

elements.name: q1_context
elements.html: Take a moment to reflect on the choices you just made.

elements.name: q1_response
elements.title: How did you choose which attack path to pursue first?

elements.name: q2_response
elements.title: At any point did you consider switching to a different path? What made you stay or switch?

elements.name: q3_response
elements.title: What was your biggest roadblock, and what would you do differently if you ran through this again?
